title: Intentional Hazard Reset
description: Carrier is pinned near own goal. Team uses an intentional hazard or void dump to force a neutral reset rather than concede possession. Reset must be fast and fair — not a long downtime or a gift.

expected_outcomes.description: Ball resets to a neutral location with no team retaining possession advantage.
Reset completes quickly — no extended dead-ball period.

must_not_outcomes.description: The dumping team re-obtains the ball immediately after reset — hazard reset becomes a free re-possession.
Reset causes >5 seconds of dead play.

notes: Map-dependent: only valid on maps with accessible hazards/voids. Slam Dunk and Bloodbowl both qualify.
